Goal: Room 211, The glass entrance to a dark room
Instruction: Walk through the glass door with a silver metal frame and a blue stripe to enter the hallway, stepping over a blue mat on the polished stone floor. Continue straight down the corridor, passing a stairwell with a green wall on your left. Keep walking straight, passing a cardboard box and a white recycling bin station on your left, while passing a dark grey door, an elevator with a pink frame, and another elevator with a blue frame on your right. Proceed towards another blue mat on the floor ahead, passing a dark bulletin board on the wall to your right. Turn slightly right to face the glass door with a silver metal frame that leads into a dark room. There is a small black rectangular sign and a keypad on the wall just to the right of this door. Stop in front of this glass door, as you have arrived at your destination.
